title: dactylorhiza maculata subsp. schurii
intro: Dactylorhiza maculata subsp. schurii, also known as the spotted marsh orchid, is a subspecies of orchid that belongs to the Dactylorhiza genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza maculata subsp. schurii include its potential to help with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to improve circulation and reduce blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
